description: The StripeWireMesh component is used primarily in ProtoFlux wires, and generates mesh data for use with a MeshRenderer.

fields.Point0: The start point in local space for this mesh
fields.Point1: The end point for this mesh in local space.
fields.Tangent0: the direction the mesh should bend after exiting start point
fields.Tangent1: the direction the mesh should bend while entering exit point.
fields.Orientation0: How much to rotate the starting point edge by after applying ``Tangent0``
fields.Orientation1: How much to rotate the end point edge by after applying ``Tangent1``
fields.Steps: how many segments the mesh should have between ``Point0`` and ``Point1``.
fields.Exp: how much the mesh should be forced in the direction of the start and end tangents when starting and ending it's path.
fields.Color0: The vertex color to give the part of the mesh starting at ``Point0``. Is interpolated along the mesh to ``Point1`` to color ``Color1``
fields.Color1: The vertex color for ``Point1`` to interpolate towards.
fields.UVScale: the scale of the material detail on the mesh.
fields.UVOffset: the offset of the material detail on the mesh.
fields.Width0: the width of the mesh in local space at ``Point0`` on the mesh. Is interpolated along the mesh to ``Point1`` to width ``Width1``
fields.Width1: The width in local space for ``Point1`` to interpolate towards.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a MeshRenderer to view the geometry generated. Don't forget to add a Material.
